topImprovementLevers: Validate requested labels against matched outcome names before synthesizing comparison tables.
Do not emit timeout/refusal language on answerable queries without at least one real tool attempt.
Trust resolved market identifiers once downstream liquidity or parameter calls succeed.
Avoid unnecessary clarification when the user already names the contract and comparator set.
Use event metadata or structured dates instead of regex heuristics to classify live buckets.
